Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. From birds to brains: My path to the fusiform face area (2024) 34 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. Computational Physics (2nd Edition) (2025) 99 upvotes, 12 comments
  3. A tail-call interpreter in (nightly) Rust 125 upvotes, 18 comments
  4. Nanocode: The best Claude Code that $200 can buy in pure JAX on TPUs 154 upvotes, 24 comments
  5. Wavelets on Graphs via Spectral Graph Theory (2009) 20 upvotes, 1 comments
  6. Gemma 4 on iPhone 386 upvotes, 99 comments
  7. Eight years of wanting, three months of building with AI 592 upvotes, 185 comments
  8. Running Gemma 4 locally with LM Studio's new headless CLI and Claude Code 177 upvotes, 50 comments
  9. Introducing GEN-1 [video] 34 upvotes, 6 comments
  10. The Mechanics of Steins Gate (2023) [pdf] 31 upvotes, 6 comments
  11. Baby's Second Garbage Collector 54 upvotes, 15 comments
  12. Music for Programming 98 upvotes, 34 comments
  13. Caveman: Why use many token when few token do trick 688 upvotes, 311 comments
  14. Friendica – A Decentralized Social Network 123 upvotes, 47 comments
  15. LÖVE: 2D Game Framework for Lua 188 upvotes, 81 comments
  16. OpenAI's fall from grace as investors race to Anthropic 26 upvotes, 8 comments
  17. OpenJDK: Panama 29 upvotes, 10 comments
  18. Microsoft hasn't had a coherent GUI strategy since Petzold 171 upvotes, 100 comments
  19. Employers use your personal data to figure out the lowest salary you'll accept 8 upvotes, 1 comments
  20. Finnish sauna heat exposure induces stronger immune cell than cytokine responses 320 upvotes, 212 comments
  21. LibreOffice – Let's put an end to the speculation 155 upvotes, 96 comments
  22. Artemis II crew see first glimpse of far side of Moon [video] 399 upvotes, 302 comments
  23. Show HN: YouTube search barely works, I made a search form with advanced filters 7 upvotes, 1 comments
  24. The Free Market Lie: Why Switzerland Has 25 Gbit Internet and America Doesn't 183 upvotes, 138 comments
  25. In Japan, the robot isn't coming for your job; it's filling the one nobody wants 86 upvotes, 73 comments
  26. A brief history of instant coffee 39 upvotes, 28 comments
  27. Spath and Splan 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  28. Show HN: TermHub – Open-source terminal control gateway built for AI Agents 5 upvotes, 1 comments
  29. Peter Thiel's big bet on solar-powered cow collars 11 upvotes, 11 comments
